title: Nutty Silky Cozy Pumpkin Stir-fry
description: This Nutty Silky Cozy Pumpkin Stir-fry is a vegetarian-friendly Filipino dish featuring pumpkin, creamy nut mixture, and the perfect touch of cayenne pepper to add some heat. It’s cozy and delicious.

ingredients.name: Nut Mix (Almonds, Cashews, Pine Nuts)
ingredients.notes: To make: mix 2 cups of raw almonds with 1/4 cup of cashews and 1 tablespoon of pine nuts. Toast in a dry skillet until fragrant.

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce (Oyster Sauce in a pinch)

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in nut mix and pumpkin puree. Add diced butternut squash.
Mix in chili flakes, fish sauce (or oyster sauce), and soy sauce.
Slowly pour in water while stirring continuously to avoid burning. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the skillet with a lid to prevent too much moisture evaporation. Allow it to cook for about 10 minutes.
Once cooked, remove from heat. Let it cool slightly before stirring in pumpkin puree well until fully combined.
Return the skillet back to the stove and bring to a simmer again for an additional 5-7 minutes or until everything is thoroughly heated through.
Your Nutty Silky Cozy Pumpkin Stir-fry is ready to serve.
